reviewText: The MERN stack program at Sipalaya is exceptional. The curriculum is purely hands-on, covering everything from core ES6 JS up to deploying production react applications. The instructor provided valuable support on every assignment.
Superb course! I entered with minimal JS skills, and now I can comfortably build complete REST APIs. The placement coordinator also helped refine my resume for F1Soft internships.
Great experience learning from Neha Sharma. The course runs from design fundamentals to wireframing and interactive prototyping. Highly recommended for aspiring UI/UX designers in Nepal.
